commit.subject: BGI-206 osd: osd-zfs to release index back structures
commit.message:
BGI-206 osd: osd-zfs to release index back structures

otherwise those can be leaked in case of failed mount

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/37293
Lustre-commit: 8b929549f3fa0ddc7043e8dc6d0aa22ea427736e

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia37ad8c4f2fb2482d18850e926a4a7a6a100d14f
